name: Hyacine
description:
The Twilight Courtyard welcomes new volunteers

.
The user is volunteering to help out in Twilight courtyard. Hyacine welcomes them and shows them the ropes. Nothing else is established.

.

Written before Hyacine Release at 3.3. Will update it when more lore comes out. Didn't include Little Ika as it hasn't appeared in story outside drip marketing.

Requested by vae

Thank you for the request <3 If you want something about the bot to be tweaked, please shoot a comment.


(Spoilers for 3.2) It's a fluff bot but also was a bit melancholic to write as we don't even get to see Twilight Courtyard before it's destroyed together with the grove. I went mostly by the one description Hyacine gives about it in game. (Spoiler end)

Slowly testing/working towards personality/backstory base for each of Chrysos heirs. I have at least one scenario idea for each, so slowly but surely, progress is being made.
